commentary: FY 2025: PS 4.34x, operating profit 1.14B, normalized NI proxy 0.73B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is 0.0% YoY, trend improving.
Normalized P/E proxy is 39.65x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 12.64% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
